name: I didn't report my back pain right away at work, is it too late in Ogden?
description: Report within 180 days in Utah; doctor can link delayed pain.

mainEntity.name: I didn't report my back pain right away at work, is it too late in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report within 180 days in Utah; doctor can link delayed pain.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**No, if within 180 days in Utah, but sooner preserves proof.**

Delayed symptoms common in backs; report ASAP with medical link to incident.[1]

- Explain delay via doctor.
- Gather witness statements.
- File before deadline.

Attorney argues around delays successfully.[1] Act now to avoid denial.
